qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Israel Reyes with a cross.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射正。 伊斯列尔·雷耶斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Ronwen Williams.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 基尼奥内斯 进球，埃里克·里拉 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Raúl Jiménez (Mexico).
Julián Quiñones (Mexico) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Khuliso Mudau.
Attempt missed. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射门偏出。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Álvaro Fidalgo (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico).
Álvaro Fidalgo (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses the top right corner. Assisted by Israel Reyes.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯射门偏出。 伊斯列尔·雷耶斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Lyle Foster (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
César Montes (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Teboho Mokoena (South Africa) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯射门被封堵。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, South Africa. Aubrey Modiba is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Lyle Foster (South Africa) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Mbekezeli Mbokazi with a cross.

events.description: 莱尔·福斯特射门偏出。 姆贝凯泽利·姆博卡齐参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Érik Lira (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Álvaro Fidalgo.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯射门被封堵。 阿尔瓦罗·菲达尔戈参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Julián Quiñones (Mexico) hits the right post with a right footed shot from the centre of the box. Assisted by Brian Gutiérrez.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯射门偏出。 布赖恩·古铁雷斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Mbekezeli Mbokazi (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, South Africa. Conceded by Jesús Gallardo.
Attempt saved. Mbekezeli Mbokazi (South Africa) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top left corner by Raúl Rangel (Mexico).

events.description: 姆贝凯泽利·姆博卡齐射正。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Raúl Jiménez.

events.description: 热苏斯·加利亚多射门被封堵。 劳尔·希门尼斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯射门偏出。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Mexico 1, South Africa 0.
Second Half begins Mexico 1, South Africa 0.
Attempt missed. Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is too high.

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from more than 35 yards is saved in the top centre of the goal by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Raúl Jiménez.

events.description: 热苏斯·加利亚多射门偏出。 布赖恩·古铁雷斯参与进攻。
